# Classic VICE Edge-Case Candidate Inventory

## Document Information

| Field | Value |
|-------|-------|
| Source Root | `native/vice/vice/src` |
| Generated UTC | 2026-05-21T17:57:00Z |
| Source Files Scanned | 812 |
| Candidate Lines | 11235 |
| Duplicate Normalized Signatures | 1882 |

## Review Rules

- This inventory is a scanner output, not a requirements list.
- Promote only observable compatibility behavior into TR records.
- Do not promote internal VICE implementation choices unless they encode behavior ViceSharp must match.
- Keep one TR per distinct observable behavior, not one TR per source line.

## Pattern Groups

- Commented Compatibility Warning: `(?i)\b(HACK|TODO|FIXME|KLUDGE|XXX|workaround)\b`
- Illegal or Invalid Mode: `(?i)\b(illegal|invalid|undefined|undocumented|forbidden)\b`
- Timing Latch or Delay: `(?i)\b(delay|delayed|latency|latch|underflow|overflow|timeout|alarm|pipeline|race)\b`
- Video Edge Timing: `(?i)\b(badline|border|sprite_dma|sprite|COL_NONE|open[ -]?border|VSP|FLI|AFLI|raster|CSEL|RSEL|DMA)\b`
- CPU Bus or Interrupt Edge: `(?i)\b(BA|AEC|NMI|IRQ|BRK|SEI|dummy|idle|open[ -]?bus|openbus|read_modify_write|DMA)\b`
- Media Protocol Edge: `(?i)\b(syncmark|weak|GCR|sector|BAM|REL|EOF|EOI|ATN|IEC|TAP|pulse|long[ -]?pulse|datasette)\b`
- Machine Model Constant: `(?i)\b(PAL|NTSC|6569|8565|VICII|C128|DTV|VIC20|PLUS4|PET|SCPU64)\b`
- Named Cycle Constant: `(?i)\b(CYCLE|LINE|CLOCK|PHASE|TICK|TIMEOUT|BORDER|SPRITE|DMA|IRQ|NMI)_[A-Z0-9_]+\b`
